description:
Composes with the 'main moved' warning. At prime time (and again at review pre-flight), compute the file overlap between (merge-base..main) and (merge-base..work/<id>). Non-empty intersection means another delivered task touched files you also touched — high-probability merge conflict or, worse, an antipattern landing in your diff.

Surface in prime output as 'overlap: N files' with the file list available via --json or --verbose. Doesn't need to know which delivery tag landed each file — just that they overlap.
title: warn when sibling deliveries touched your file footprint
